title: The Royal Armouries framework document 2025-2028
body: "This framework document details the broad governance framework within which the Royal Armouries and DCMS operate. It details the the Royal Armouries’ core responsibilities, describes the governance and accountability framework that applies between the roles of the DCMS and the Royal Armouries and sets out how the day-to-day relationship works in practice, including in relation to governance and financial matters. "
